codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and the updated config/connector/release test code. The implementation adds deterministic built-binary coverage for search-to-native retrieval, search-to-OA-fallback retrieval, and outside-repo execution, plus config-threaded connector endpoint overrides needed to drive those flows from normalized search output without source-specific translation. I did not identify any high-confidence actionable code defects in scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The connector endpoint override environment variables introduced for deterministic built-artifact and local end-to-end testing are implemented but not documented in the shared environment guidance, so future workers would need to rediscover them from code and tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md documents optional integrations and .env precedence but does not mention SEARCH_PAPER_ARXIV_BASE_URL, SEARCH_PAPER_OPENAIRE_BASE_URL, SEARCH_PAPER_CORE_BASE_URL, SEARCH_PAPER_EUROPEPMC_BASE_URL, SEARCH_PAPER_PMC_SEARCH_URL, SEARCH_PAPER_PMC_SUMMARY_URL, or SEARCH_PAPER_UNPAYWALL_BASE_URL; compare internal/config/config.go:110-152 and internal/release/release_test.go:130-225,316-324 where those overrides are required for deterministic artifact e2e coverage.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the mission artifacts, go-release-worker guidance, transcript skeleton, and commit 062a345b51db5697b989167067c062810db0c65f. The feature covers built-artifact search-to-native retrieval, search-to-fallback retrieval, and outside-repo execution using normalized search output and connector base-URL overrides, and I found no high-confidence in-scope code defects.
